Seek long test scenarios
- seek(0): seek to the start and read through the beginning of the stream to verify initial positioning.
- seek(mBlockSize / 2): seek into the first block to ensure mid-block positioning reads expected data after seek.
- seek(mBlockSize): seek to the boundary between blocks and confirm correct transition to the next block.
- seek(totalLength - 1): seek to the last byte and verify the final byte can be read correctly.
- seek(totalLength): attempt to seek to the end position and verify behavior (read after seek or appropriate exception, depending on implementation).
- seek to arbitrary offsets across multiple blocks: validate correct data after seeking to various positions, including positions near block boundaries and after buffer refills.
